title: Time Zone Converter - Convert Time Between Zones
description: Free time zone converter. Convert time between different time zones worldwide instantly.
keywords: time zone converter, time zone calculator, world clock, time conversion
intro: Convert time between different time zones around the world.

faq.q: How does time zone conversion work?
faq.a: Each time zone has an offset from UTC (Coordinated Universal Time). The converter calculates the difference between source and target zone offsets to determine the converted time.

faq.q: Does it handle daylight saving time?
faq.a: This converter uses fixed UTC offsets. For DST-aware conversion, note that some zones shift by 1 hour during summer months.
